name: Bitrise
tagline: Inspect Bitrise apps and CI builds
description: List accessible Bitrise applications, inspect app details, and review filtered build histories and individual build results.

auth.hint: Create a Bitrise personal access token or Workspace API token and send the raw token value in the Authorization header.

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: List applications accessible to the authenticated Bitrise account or Workspace token.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort applications by last_build_at or created_at.

params.name: next
params.description: Slug of the first app to return on the next page.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum apps per page; defaults to and cannot exceed 50.

params.name: project_type
params.description: Filter by project type, such as ios or android.

tools.name: get_app
tools.description: Get details for one Bitrise application.

params.name: app-slug
params.description: Application slug from list_apps or the Bitrise application URL.

tools.name: list_builds
tools.description: List and filter builds for a Bitrise application.

params.name: branch
params.description: Filter by the branch that was built.

params.name: status
params.description: Build status: 0 not finished, 1 successful, 2 failed, 3 aborted with failure, or 4 aborted with success.

params.name: next
params.description: Slug of the first build to return on the next page.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum builds per page; defaults to and cannot exceed 50.

tools.name: get_build
tools.description: Get the full recorded details for one Bitrise build.

params.name: build-slug
params.description: Build slug returned by list_builds or present in the build URL.
